node.statement: KERNEL part of (5.1): ||P((y-P(y)) o u)|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, where y=h o t, h=h_{r,s}, t,u in A. Set n:=y-P(y). By P^2=P (GT-Pprops), P(n)=P(y)-P^2(y)=P(y)-P(y)=0, so n in Ker P. Apply GT-FI (First-Insertion, instantiated at the kernel element n with b=u in A): since P(n)=0 we have P(P(n) o u)=P(0 o u)=0, so ||P(n o u)|| = ||P(n o u)-P(P(n) o u)|| <= C sqrt(eta)||n|| ||u|| by GT-FI. Now bound ||n||=||y-P(y)|| <= ||y||+||P(y)|| (triangle, GT-bh-cstar). ||y||=||h o t|| <= ||h|| ||t|| (GT-jb-submult) <= C||r|| ||s|| ||t|| (crude bound, node 1.1). ||P(y)|| <= ||P|| ||y|| <= (1+C eta)||y|| <= 2 C||r|| ||s|| ||t|| (GT-Pprops). Hence ||n|| <= 3 C||r|| ||s|| ||t|| = C''||r|| ||s|| ||t||. Therefore ||P(n o u)|| <= C sqrt(eta) * C''||r|| ||s|| ||t|| * ||u|| = C' sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, constant absorbed.
